headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; frame-src https://*.public.blob.vercel-storage.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://esm.sh; connect-src 'self' https://esm.sh https://*.vercel-storage.com; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
